# Full learner lifecycle on one config: add as learner, promote to voter,
# then remove. Exercises the three single-change transitions in sequence.

add-nodes id=1 voters=1,2
----
INFO 1 switched to configuration voters=(1 2)
INFO 1 became follower at term 0

apply-conf-change id=1 changes=l3
----
voters=(1 2) learners=(3) auto-leave=false

apply-conf-change id=1 changes=v3
----
voters=(1 2 3) learners=() auto-leave=false

apply-conf-change id=1 changes=r3
----
voters=(1 2) learners=() auto-leave=false
